Name: Cost_To_Consumer
Description: Determines the unit cost when using the **STIBarrier** intervention to change defaults from demographics. Note that there is no cost for condoms distributed using demographics-configured default usage probabilities.

Name: Disqualifying_Properties
Description: A list of **IndividualProperty** key:value pairs that cause an intervention to be aborted (persistent interventions will stop being distributed to individuals with these values). See :ref:`demo-properties` parameters for more information. Generally used to control the flow of health care access. For example, to prevent the same individual from accessing health care via two different routes at the same time.

Name: Dont_Allow_Duplicates
Description: If an individual's container has an intervention, set to true (1) to prevent them from receiving another copy of the intervention. Supported by all intervention classes.

Name: Early
Description:
The left asymptote for the sigmoid trend over time.
The **Early** value must be smaller than the **Late** value.

Name: Intervention_Name
Description: The optional name used to refer to this intervention as a means to differentiate it from others that use the same class.

Name: Late
Description:
The right asymptote for the sigmoid trend over time.
The **Late** value must be larger than the **Early** value.

Name: MidYear
Description: The time of the inflection point in the sigmoid trend over time.

Name: New_Property_Value
Description: An optional **IndividualProperty** key:value pair that will be assigned when the intervention is applied. See :ref:`demo-properties` parameters for more information. Generally used to indicate the broad category of health care cascade to which an intervention belongs to prevent individuals from accessing care through multiple pathways. For example, if an individual must already be taking a particular medication to be prescribed a new one.

Name: Rate
Description: The slope of the inflection point in the sigmoid trend over time. A Rate of 1 sets the slope to a 25% change in probability per year. Specify a negative Rate (e.g. -1) to achieve a negative sigmoid.

Name: Relationship_Type
Description:
The relationship type to which the condom usage probability is applied. Possible values are:

* TRANSITORY
* INFORMAL
* MARITAL

Name: Usage_Duration_Constant
Description: Each instance will receive this constant/fixed value.

Name: Usage_Duration_Distribution
Description:
For the distribution of each **STIBarrier**, a randomly selected duration from this distribution will determine when the man stops using the intervention and revert back to condom usage based on the relationship type. Possible values are:

* NOT_INITIALIZED
* CONSTANT_DISTRIBUTION
* UNIFORM_DISTRIBUTION
* GAUSSIAN_DISTRIBUTION
* EXPONENTIAL_DISTRIBUTION
* POISSON_DISTRIBUTION
* LOG_NORMAL_DISTRIBUTION
* DUAL_CONSTANT_DISTRIBUTION
* WEIBULL_DISTRIBUTION
* DUAL_EXPONENTIAL_DISTRIBUTION

Name: Usage_Duration_Exponential
Description: The mean for an exponential distribution.

Name: Usage_Duration_Gaussian_Mean
Description: The mean for a Gaussian distribution.

Name: Usage_Duration_Gaussian_Std_Dev
Description: The standard deviation for a Gaussian distribution.

Name: Usage_Duration_Kappa
Description: The shape value in a Weibull distribution.

Name: Usage_Duration_Lambda
Description: The scale value in a Weibull distribution.

Name: Usage_Duration_Log_Normal_Mu
Description: The mean for a log-normal distribution.

Name: Usage_Duration_Log_Normal_Sigma
Description: The width for a log-normal distribution.

Name: Usage_Duration_Max
Description: The maximum of the uniform distribution.

Name: Usage_Duration_Mean_1
Description: The mean of the first exponential distribution.

Name: Usage_Duration_Mean_2
Description: The mean of the second exponential distribution.

Name: Usage_Duration_Min
Description: The minimum of the uniform distribution.

Name: Usage_Duration_Peak_2_Value
Description: The value to assign to the remaining individuals.

Name: Usage_Duration_Poisson_Mean
Description: The mean for a Poisson distribution.

Name: Usage_Duration_Proportion_0
Description: The proportion of individuals to assign a value of zero.

Name: Usage_Duration_Proportion_1
Description: The proportion of individuals in the first exponential distribution.

Name: Usage_Expiration_Event
Description: When the person stops using the STIBarrier, this event will be broadcasted. See :doc:`parameter-campaign-event-list` for possible values (note: not all built-in events are applicable), or use a custom event defined in the **Custom_Individudual_Events** list in the config file.
